io_contract.input_shape: top-level array of task_id and prompt records
io_contract.output_shape: top-level array of task_id and answer records

model_assets.production_usage: reused by Version 7 image packaging for bundled CPU Ollama and nemotron-3-nano:4b
model_assets.git_policy: model payload remains ignored and is not committed

notes: Version 7 is the official repository focus.
Historical benchmark and analytics files are retained for audit context and excluded from the production image.
The final submission image reference must be publicly pullable before it is entered in the submission form.
